author: Kendra Barnett
title: This Startup Wants to Fix the Slog of Adtech Vendor Selection With a AI-Supported Matchmaking
description: CartographAI lets marketers explore and compare 1,000 martech and adtech vendors according to their unique needs, and is already being tested by Reckitt, LinkedIn, and Mars.
content: A new platform could help marketing leaders more easily compare the capabilities of potential partners, demo tools, and select the right vendors for their needs. The tech, called CartographAI, uses a… [+576 chars]

author: Kathryn Lundstrom
title: Advertisers Can Now Buy In-Store Audio and Fuel Pump Ads at Sam’s Club
description: The warehouse retailer is expanding its experiential offerings.
content: Sam’s Club is opening up more ways for advertisers to get in front of its shoppers.The retailer is selling in-store audio ads and video ads that appear next to fuel pumps through its retail media net… [+642 chars]
